title: Selection Bias in Small-Sample Leaf-HSI Regression: apparent vs. nested cross-validation
description: Code and reproducibility materials for measuring the apparent-nested difference in performance estimates for small-sample leaf hyperspectral (HSI) regression. Covers four feature-selector families (genetic algorithm, RFE, LASSO, mutual information) and two regressors (PLS, LightGBM), a synthetic-null experiment, and a group/selection leakage decomposition. Accompanies the associated manuscript.
